name: list_for_user
_note: sponsorship.list_for_user (server.js:76556, MACROS/runMacro path) returns the caller's ACTIVE npc_sponsorships joined to world_npcs for the NPC name. The assassin's internal owner actor has no rows, so {} returns ok:true with sponsorships:[] (an empty array, never no_db). This is the DB-backed macro; note the lens itself resolves sponsorship.list_for_user to the LENS_ACTIONS in-memory handler (LENS_ACTIONS wins in /api/lens/run dispatch), so this MACROS entry is reached only via runMacro/MCP, not the lens UI. Read-only — no wallet writes.
